name: Extension Janitor
tagline: Find what's slowing your browser. Fix it in one click.
description: Scans for orphaned entries, heavyweight extensions, and stale caches. Deep Clean disables bloat and clears junk. Pro finishes the job with a verified native tool that cleans what extensions can't touch.
features: Instant health score for your browser
Deep Clean mode with live progress feed
Pro: native cleanup tool for disk-level caches
